Sewall Wright's theory of adaptive landscapes of fitness.

{{Tweet|name=[[Eric Weinstein]]|username=EricRWeinstein|date=Jul 31, 2010|text=An honest measure of great science is simply the depth of the adaptive valley it crosses, whether intellectual, political, or imaginative.|ID=An honest measure of great science is simply the depth of the adaptive valley it crosses, whether intellectual, political, or imaginative.}}

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Biology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
